namespace Threadlink.Shared
{
    public static partial class ThreadlinkIDs
    {
        public static class Dextra
        {
            /// <summary>
            /// AUTO-GENERATED BY THREADLINK'S CODEGEN. DO NOT EDIT MANUALLY.
            /// <para></para>
            /// ID Markers of the input modes used by Dextra.
            /// </summary>
            public enum InputModes : byte
            {
                #region Native Modes:
                Unresponsive = 0,
                #endregion

                #region User Modes:
                {User-Defined Input Modes}
                #endregion
            }
        }
    }
}
